sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19278" key="ba/llis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάλλις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plant</tr_> with wonderful medicinal properties, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1751.tlg001:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xanth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
